title: WedDecor 20 Metre Burgundy Organza Ribbon with Woven Edge Wide Sheer for Gift Package, Wrapping, Scrapbook, Arts and Craft Party Decoration, Hair Bows, 25mm
features: ORGANZA RIBBON: This organza ribbon will come with 6mm, 10mm,15mm, 25mm and 38mm wide in size and 20 metre (Yards) long. There are different assorted colours as per your need and have an elusive shiny surface which makes it beautiful, eye-catching and lovely ribbons
DECORATIVE: These subtle woven edge ribbons are used for decorating a wedding, gift package wrapping, scrapbook, home decoration, arts, crafts, and bows etc

HIGH QUALITY RIBBONS: Organza ribbons are made of high quality organza woven. You can use it again and again for any occasion. These beautiful woven edge organza ribbon will look brighter in lights due to its smooth shiny surface

IDEAL FOR CREATIVITY: Using creative mind you can create your unique style using woven edge ribbon. The organza ribbon is available in different colours with which you can choose your favourite colour and create a unique style of creativity

SMOOTH RIBBONS: The woven edge ribbons have a smooth appearance. It will give you a good touch and feel. Using bright colours of satin ribbon you will feel more attractive to them, you can enjoy the fun and pleasure of the DIY process while using these ribbons
description: Product Description These subtle woven edge ribbons are made of high-quality organza woven, These beautiful woven edge organza ribbon will look brighter in lights due to their smooth shiny surface. The woven edge ribbons have a smooth appearance. It will give you a good touch and feel. Using bright colours of satin ribbon you will feel more attracted to them, you can enjoy the fun and pleasure of the DIY process while using these ribbons. These subtle ribbons are used for decorating a wedding, gift package wrapping, scrapbook, home decoration, arts, crafts, and bows, etc
